summary: Full e2e testing of redesigned DirectChatPage (AlloVoisins-style 3-column layout). Backend: 10/10 pytest passed for login + all chat-related endpoints. Frontend: all 23 data-testid elements render, message sending persists, conversations sidebar with search/tabs/active marker works, banner 'Solicitação privada' with Exibir/Ocultar toggle works for users with posts (verified with Carlos -> Maria), conversation switching navigates correctly. No JS console errors, no page errors.

issues: Cosmetic only: rating shown as '5/5 (2 avaliações)' is hardcoded placeholder (no real ratings backend) - acceptable per requirements as placeholder visual.
Sidebar shows conversations using last_message_time formatted as full date (dd/mm/yyyy) for all messages including today - AlloVoisins shows relative time. Minor polish.

critical_code_review_comments: DirectChatPage.js is ~695 lines - approaching threshold but acceptable. Could be split into <ConversationsSidebar/>, <ChatPanel/>, <ProfilePanel/> subcomponents for maintainability.
fetchConversations polls every 5s and fetchMessages every 3s simultaneously - consider unifying or using websocket; minor inefficiency.

convFilter state ('unread'/'archived') only changes tab visual; no actual filtering of conversations by unread/archived occurs because backend has no such flag. This is acceptable as placeholder but should be flagged for future work.
Rating '5/5 (2 avaliações)' is hardcoded - either remove or compute from backend ratings (no /api/ratings endpoint exists).
ActionBtn placeholders (Recusar/Agendar/Pagamento/Avaliar) toast.info-only - intentional per spec.
Inline lucide-react import duplicates 'Star as StarIcon' and 'Video as VideoIcon' / 'X as XIcon' - works but slightly redundant.
currentPost logic picks first 'need' post; if multiple, no selection UI - acceptable for now.
test_credentials: maria@test.com / test123 (migrant), carlos@test.com / test123 (volunteer), ana@test.com / test123 (helper). Saved working - no auth issues.
seed_data_creation: Two test messages were sent during testing (TEST_redesign_chat_msg and PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_<ts>) between Maria and Carlos via real POST /api/messages. They persist in DB - safe but not cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: DirectChatPage redesign is complete and fully functional. Backend untouched. 3-column layout (Mensagens sidebar | chat | profile panel) renders correctly. All UI flows tested: login, 3-col render, sidebar search/tabs/active marker, conversation switching, message send/receive persistence, banner+post preview toggle for users with posts, profile panel actions/toasts, action button placeholders. No regressions in existing /api endpoints. If future testing: use /auth (not /login) route to access login form.
